# netbox_vlan_extended (Resource)

Extended version of netbox_vlan that adds support for tenant_id and cascade-deletes any prefixes referencing the VLAN on destroy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_tenant" "example" {
  name = "Example Tenant"
}

resource "netbox_vlan_extended" "example" {
  name        = "VLAN 100"
  vid         = 100
  tenant_id   = netbox_tenant.example.id
  description = "Example VLAN with tenant and cascade-delete of prefixes"
  tags        = []
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `vid` (Number)

### Optional

- `description` (String) Defaults to `""`.
- `group_id` (Number)
- `role_id` (Number)
- `site_id` (Number)
- `status` (String) Valid values are `active`, `reserved` and `deprecated`. Defaults to `active`.
- `tags` (Set of String)
- `tenant_id` (Number) ID of the tenant to assign to the VLAN.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tags_all` (Set of String)
